offer: For restaurant procurement managers processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate invoice reconciliation causes payment delays. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate invoice reconciliation leading to payment delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant procurement managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try manual entry for invoice data and reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing invoice data
